skill.name: frontend-design
skill.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
skill.summary: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill wh...
skill.author: ZhanlinCui

security_audit.summary: All 16 static findings are false positives. The scanner incorrectly flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' on design guideline text (lines mentioning 'design', 'bold', 'retro-futuristic', 'art deco'). The 'system reconnaissance' flags on lines 7, 30, 34 refer to design context ('purpose', 'spatial composition'), not actual system scanning. This is a pure documentation skill with no scripts, network calls, filesystem access, environment access, or external commands. Safe to publish.

content.value_statement: Users struggle with generic AI-generated frontend code that lacks visual character. This skill provides design thinking guidance and aesthetic principles to create production-grade interfaces with distinctive, memorable visual identities.
actual_capabilities: Create production-grade HTML/CSS/JS and React components with distinctive aesthetics
Apply bold design thinking with intentional aesthetic directions (minimalist, maximalist, retro-futuristic, etc.)
Select unique typography, cohesive color themes, and creative motion effects
Build asymmetric layouts with spatial composition and visual depth
Avoid generic AI aesthetics by committing to specific, memorable design visions
Implement refined micro-interactions and page-load animations
limitations: Does not generate backend code or API integrations
Cannot access existing design files or Figma tokens for reference
Accessibility compliance is encouraged but not automatically verified
Performance optimization beyond basic CSS is not explicitly covered

use_cases.title: Build a landing page from scratch
use_cases.description: Create a visually striking landing page for a startup product with a bold aesthetic direction

use_cases.title: Design a React component library
use_cases.description: Develop a set of cohesive, styled React components with consistent design language

use_cases.title: Transform wireframes into polished UI
use_cases.description: Take basic requirements and elevate them into creative, production-ready interfaces

prompt_templates.title: Basic component request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [component type] for a [use case]. Make it visually distinctive and production-ready with [style preference].

prompt_templates.title: Full page with design direction
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a complete [page type] page. Use a [aesthetic direction like brutalist/minimalist/retro-futuristic] aesthetic. Include [specific sections].
prompt_templates.scenario: Complete page with clear design vision

prompt_templates.title: Design system component
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a set of related [component names] that share a cohesive [specific aesthetic]. They should work together in a [context] application.

prompt_templates.title: Interactive dashboard
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a [dashboard type] with data visualization, filters, and interactive elements. Choose a distinctive visual identity that fits [industry/use case].

output_examples.input: Create a pricing page for a SaaS product with a bold, modern aesthetic
output_examples.output: A complete pricing page with three tiers, custom pricing cards featuring gradient accents, staggered reveal animations on load, hover micro-interactions, a toggle for monthly/yearly pricing, and a distinctive dark theme with sharp accent colors. Typography pairs a bold display font with a clean body font.

output_examples.input: Build a login form with personality
output_examples.output: An animated login form with a distinctive split-screen layout. Left side features an abstract geometric background with grain texture. Right side has the form with custom-styled inputs featuring floating labels, a memorable submit button with hover animation, and error states with smooth transitions.

best_practices: Choose ONE clear aesthetic direction and commit fully - refined minimalism or bold maximalism both work, but mixed intentions create generic results
Use distinctive font pairings: avoid Inter/Roboto/Arial, instead choose memorable display fonts paired with refined body type
Prioritize fewer, higher-impact animations over scattered micro-interactions - one orchestrated reveal creates more delight
anti_patterns: Converging on common AI choices like Space Grotesk, purple gradients, or predictable component patterns
Using timid, evenly-distributed color palettes instead of dominant colors with sharp accents
Defaulting to solid backgrounds without textures, depth, or contextual visual atmosphere

faq.question: Does this skill work with any frontend framework?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill provides design guidance applicable to React, Vue, plain HTML/CSS, or any frontend technology. The focus is on design thinking and aesthetic principles.

faq.question: Can this skill help with accessibility?
faq.answer: The skill encourages attention to detail which supports accessibility, but explicit a11y verification is not included. You should test accessibility separately.

faq.question: How is this different from generic code generation?
faq.answer: This skill emphasizes intentional design choices, distinctive aesthetics, and avoiding generic AI patterns. It asks for your design direction first before writing code.

faq.question: Does it support dark mode?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill explicitly encourages varying between light and dark themes and choosing what fits the aesthetic vision best.

faq.question: Can I use custom fonts with this skill?
faq.answer: Absolutely. The skill specifically recommends avoiding generic fonts and choosing distinctive, characterful typography.

faq.question: How detailed are the generated interfaces?
faq.answer: The skill aims for production-grade quality with attention to animations, micro-interactions, and visual polish - not just functional but memorable.
